note: Monthly activity (passengers / movements / cargo) by airport. Refreshed nightly by .github/workflows/refresh-data.yml; read same-origin by the browser. No synthetic data.

sources.eurostat: Eurostat avia_paoc (PAS_CRD passengers; CAF_PAS flights) + avia_gooc (FRM_LD_NLD freight, tonnes)
sources.statcan: Statistics Canada WDS: 23-10-0253 passengers, 23-10-0254 cargo, 23-10-0008 aircraft movements
